overall.description: Cinematic game engine footage showing two spacecraft—a large angular cruiser and a smaller cylindrical vessel with blue thrusters—maneuvering through a reddish-brown nebula in deep space. The camera follows the ships as they fly past a distant asteroid station, with the smaller ship performing a sweeping arc around the larger vessel.

scene_state.functional_zone: deep space nebula with distant asteroid structures

agents.ego_description: piloting the smaller cylindrical ship in formation with the larger cruiser, maintaining position on the right side

entered.detail: angular capital ship with green navigation lights and detailed hull plating
smaller vessel with glowing blue thrusters and segmented hull
vast reddish-brown gaseous clouds filling the space background
rocky structure with scattered lights visible in the distance

segments.scene_description: The scene opens in deep space with two spacecraft flying in formation through a reddish nebula. The larger cruiser dominates the center frame while the smaller cylindrical vessel with blue thrusters flies alongside on the right. A distant asteroid station is barely visible on the far left, shrouded in the nebula's haze.

scene_state.functional_zone: deep space nebula during ship maneuvering

events.description: smaller cylindrical ship begins ascending and banking left to circle around the larger cruiser

agents.ego_description: executing a sweeping left turn and ascent to fly over and around the larger cruiser

segments.scene_description: The smaller ship breaks formation and maneuvers around the larger cruiser, moving from the right side up and over the larger vessel. The camera tracks this movement, keeping both ships in frame as they reposition. The asteroid station on the left becomes more distinct and detailed as the ships approach it.

scene_state.functional_zone: asteroid station approach in deep space

events.description: asteroid station becomes prominently visible with detailed surface structures and lighting

agents.ego_description: continuing past the asteroid station with the larger cruiser now trailing behind on the right

segments.scene_description: The ships continue their flight with the smaller vessel now leading on the left and the larger cruiser following on the right. The asteroid station dominates the left side of the frame, showing detailed rocky surfaces and illuminated structures. The nebula's warm reddish hues continue to fill the background as the ships maintain their new formation.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a reddish nebula as two spacecraft shift their formation while approaching a distant asteroid station. It begins with a large angular cruiser and a smaller cylindrical vessel flying side-by-side, with the station appearing as a faint, shrouded silhouette in the hazy distance. As the smaller ship breaks formation, the camera tracks its sweeping arc up and over the larger vessel, causing the asteroid station to emerge more distinctly from the nebula. The scene then expands to reveal the detailed rocky surfaces and illuminated structures of the station as it begins to dominate the left side of the frame. Finally, the ships settle into a new arrangement with the smaller vessel leading the way through the warm reddish hues of deep space.
